status.description: completed = task done as briefed; partial = some of it done, see followups; blocked = could not proceed, see blockers in summary; failed = attempted and abandoned

summary.description: 2-5 sentences: what was changed and why, plus any blockers

files_changed.description: Repo-relative paths of every file created, modified, or deleted

command.description: Exact test command run, or empty if none

detail.description: Failure output summary if failed, else empty

followups.description: Work intentionally left undone, discovered debt, or things the parent should verify

deviations.description: Every place the implementation departs from the brief, and why. Empty if none.
